content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Dimovtax: Tax Accountant (CPA/EA Required) - US Remote Anywhere in the World Florida Accounting and CPA Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5045/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 401 NW 31st Ave, Miami FL 33125-4228 <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://dimovtax.com">https://dimovtax.com</a> </p> <p>Hi!</p> <p>We are seeking a highly skilled&nbsp;<strong>Tax Accountant,&nbsp;</strong>a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) or Enrolled Agent (EA), to join our dynamic firm. This unique, permanent, full-time role combines high-level tax preparation and advisory with essential administrative management. The ideal candidate is a professional self-starter who can efficiently prioritize technical tax work alongside critical office support duties.</p> <p><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Tax Preparation &amp; Compliance:</strong>&nbsp;Prepare and review complex Individual and Business Tax Returns (1040, 1120, 1120S, 1065). Handle specialized reporting including equity compensation (RSUs/ESPP), Cryptocurrency, and complex international forms (e.g., FBAR 114, 8938, 2555, 1116, 3520).</li> <li><strong>Advisory Support:</strong>&nbsp;Research tax law, assist with client tax planning, and support senior staff in resolving IRS and State tax notices.</li> <li><strong>Client Interaction:</strong>&nbsp;Communicate directly and professionally with clients to gather necessary information and provide updates.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>Active&nbsp;<strong>CPA</strong>&nbsp;license or&nbsp;<strong>Enrolled Agent (EA)</strong>&nbsp;designation.</li> <li>At least 2 years of proven experience.</li> <li>Proven expertise in complex tax preparation across various entity types.</li> <li>Exceptional organizational skills, attention to detail, and a high level of professionalism.</li> <li>Proficiency in MS Excel, Word, Outlook, Google platforms, and rapid adaptability to specialized tax software.</li> <li>Excellent professional English speaking and writing skills for frequent client and team communication.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Work Environment</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Busy Season:</strong>&nbsp;Extended hours and&nbsp;<strong>mandatory overtime</strong>&nbsp;are required during our busy season (typically February through April). Paid overtime is provided.</li> <li><strong>Growth:</strong>&nbsp;This role offers significant opportunities for professional growth and advancement within the firm.</li> <li><strong>Culture:</strong>&nbsp;We offer a supportive, team-oriented, and professional work environment.</li> </ul> <p>We look forward to reviewing your application!</p> <p>Job Type: Full-time</p> <p>Pay: $85,000.00 - $120,000.00 per year</p> <p>Experience:</p> <ul> <li>Tax accounting: 3 years (Preferred)</li> </ul> <p>License/Certification:</p> <ul> <li>CPA (Required)</li> <li>Enrolled Agent (Required)</li> </ul> <p>Work Location: Remote</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dimovtax-tax-accountant-cpa-ea-required-us-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dimovtax-tax-accountant-cpa-ea-required-us-remote</a></p> Mon, 04 May 2026 10:40:44 +0000 Wed, 03 Jun 2026 10:40:44 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dimovtax-tax-accountant-cpa-ea-required-us-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dimovtax-tax-accountant-cpa-ea-required-us-remote MapTiler: Growth Manager | Maps Platform (Remote in Europe) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇲 Armenia, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇿 Azerbaijan, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇧🇬 Bulgaria, 🇧🇾 Belarus, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇪 Georgia, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇺 Hungary, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇸 Iceland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇰🇿 Kazakhstan, 🇱🇮 Liechtenstein, 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇨 Monaco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇷🇸 Serbia, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇲 San Marino, and 🇺🇦 Ukraine Plzeňský kraj Analytics, Digital Marketing, and Budgeting Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0144/3523/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Zug, Switzerland <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.maptiler.com/">https://www.maptiler.com/</a> </p> <ul> <li>Full-time</li> <li>Remote in Europe&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Description</strong><br><br>MapTiler is a global leader in high-performance mapping technology. We provide developers and enterprises with the building blocks to create world-class maps. We are seeking a strategic&nbsp;<strong>Growth Manager</strong>&nbsp;to lead our performance marketing and international expansion.<br><br>This is a role for a driven expert who understands that growth in a technical B2B/B2D (Business-to-Developer) environment requires a blend of analytical rigor, technical curiosity, and strategic scaling.<br><br><strong>What you will do</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Global Performance Strategy:</strong>&nbsp;Design, execute, and own the roadmap for multi-channel performance campaigns (SEM, Social, Programmatic) with a focus on scaling our reach across AMER, EMEA, and APAC.</li> <li><strong>Full-Funnel Optimization:</strong>&nbsp;Take ownership of the user journey; &nbsp;from the first touchpoint to API integration. You will optimize landing pages and the sign-up flow to reduce "Time to First Map" for developers.</li> <li><strong>Strategic Experimentation:</strong>&nbsp;Lead a systematic experimentation framework. You won’t just run A/B tests; you will build a culture of hypothesis-driven growth across our web presence and product onboarding.</li> <li><strong>Attribution &amp; ROI:</strong>&nbsp;Architect and manage our marketing attribution models. You will move beyond surface-level metrics to track deep-funnel events, ensuring marketing spend aligns with high-value enterprise leads and API usage.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Leadership:</strong>&nbsp;Act as the bridge between Product, Engineering, and Marketing.
